sn_aia_tool.description: Creates a new warranty claim record. caller_name is auto-populated from the current user.
sn_aia_tool.input_schema: [{"name":"customer","description":"Customer company sys_id","mandatory":true},{"name":"device","description":"Device sys_id from cmdb_ci_med_device","mandatory":true},{"name":"claim_reason","description":"Reason for warranty claim","mandatory":true},{"name":"priority","description":"Priority: 1=Critical, 2=High, 3=Moderate, 4=Low","mandatory":false},{"name":"customer_name","description":"Customer display name","mandatory":false},{"name":"device_serial_number","description":"Device serial number","mandatory":false},{"name":"device_name","description":"Device display name","mandatory":false}]
sn_aia_tool.name: Create Warranty Claim
